category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a library for converting WMF files.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name provides libwmf and source_facts.repo identifies the official libwmf repository.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo point to the official GitHub repository; its README is the best official documentation surface found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies WMF conversion; source_facts.executables lists converters such as wmf2svg and wmf2eps.
